penalties.description: Task appears to be a demonstration or training video showing intracorporeal knot tying steps rather than a timed performance attempt. No completion observed.

reasoning: This appears to be an instructional demonstration showing the steps of intracorporeal suturing with labeled phases rather than a scored performance attempt. The video shows proper technique including C-loop formation, square knots, reverse C-loop, and slip knot formation, but lacks the timing structure and completion criteria needed for FLS scoring. No suture cuts or final assessment of target accuracy and slit closure are shown.
